sentences.arabic: الْعُودُ آلَةٌ مُوسِيقِيَّةٌ وَثِيقَةٌ شِبْهُ كَمَّثْرَى لَهَا أَوْتَارٌ تُعْزَفُ بِالْأَصَابِعِ.
sentences.translation: Oud je kratkovrati glazbeni instrument u obliku kruške sa žicama koje se sviraju prstima.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is a short-necked, pear-shaped musical instrument with strings played with the fingers.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْعُودُ أَبَا الْآلَاتِ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةِ الْوَتَرِيَّةِ فِي الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Oud se smatra ocem svih žičanih instrumenata na svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is considered the father of all stringed instruments in the world.

sentences.arabic: يُصْنَعُ الْعُودُ مِنَ الْخَشَبِ وَيَحْتَاجُ عَازِفُهُ إِلَى سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ التَّدْرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Oud se izrađuje od drveta, a sviračima su potrebne godine vježbe.
sentences.translationEn: It is made of wood and its players need years of practice.

sentences.arabic: صَوْتُ الْعُودِ دَافِئٌ وَعَمِيقٌ وَيُثِيرُ الْمَشَاعِرَ فِي النَّفْسِ.
sentences.translation: Zvuk ouda je topao i dubok i budi snažne osjećaje.
sentences.translationEn: The sound of the oud is warm and deep and stirs the emotions.
